name: Feature request
about: Suggest something to add or change
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: cremenescu
---

## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?
     Concrete scenarios are more useful than abstract "would be nice". -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How you imagine it working. UI sketch / mockup welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you already use, other apps that solve this, etc. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This belongs in the **app itself** (not in your `confCons.xml`
      or in mRemoteNG on Windows).
- [ ] This is **not** an upstream FreeRDP / SwiftTerm issue (if it is,
      please file there too).
- [ ] If it adds a third-party dependency, you've thought about whether
      it can be bundled in the `.dmg` cleanly.

## Anything else

<!-- Related issues, links, context. -->
